coreCompetencies: Basic notions of the AARRR funnel (acquisition, activation, retention, revenue, referral)
Reads product analytics and reports funnel conversion rates
Documents experiment hypotheses and results
Runs a simple A/B test with guidance
Notions of activation and retention metrics
Builds basic cohort views to see retention over time
Understands the concept of a North Star metric
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel, GA)
Basic SQL to pull event data
Notions of referral and viral mechanics
indicators: Needs 6-12 months of mentoring in growth

coreCompetencies: Designs growth experiments with clear hypotheses and metrics
Runs A/B tests and interprets statistical significance
Analyzes funnel drop-off and proposes activation improvements
Builds cohort analysis to measure retention and engagement
Instruments events and defines conversion metrics
Tests referral and onboarding flows
Prioritizes experiments by expected impact and effort
complementaryCompetencies: Hands-on with an experimentation tool
SQL for funnel and cohort analysis
Notions of product-led growth

coreCompetencies: Designs growth strategies for a stage of the AARRR funnel
Builds and instruments growth loops (referral, content, viral)
Runs rigorous A/B and multivariate experiments with clean readouts
Improves activation and retention with cohort-based analysis
Defines and tracks the North Star metric and its input metrics
Designs monetization and pricing experiments
Works cross-functionally with engineering, design and data
complementaryCompetencies: Product-led growth motions and self-serve onboarding
Experiment design and statistical rigor
Notions of market and channel expansion
indicators: Leads growth initiatives for a funnel stage

coreCompetencies: Owns the growth strategy for acquisition, activation or retention
Designs the product-led growth motion end to end
Builds a portfolio of growth loops and compounding mechanics
Defines the North Star metric and the growth model
Runs a rigorous experimentation program with guardrail metrics
Leads monetization, pricing and packaging experiments
Drives a data-informed growth culture across squads
complementaryCompetencies: Network effects and viral growth mechanics
Growth infrastructure and experimentation platforms
International and market expansion
indicators: Defines growth strategy for the product

coreCompetencies: Leads growth across multiple funnel stages and squads
Defines the growth model, North Star and input metrics
Runs the experimentation program with statistical rigor and guardrails
Scales activation, retention and monetization initiatives
Builds and maintains growth loops and referral engines

Aligns growth strategy with product and business goals
complementaryCompetencies: Hypergrowth and scaling playbooks

Growth budget and resource management

coreCompetencies: Directs the growth strategy for a product line

coreCompetencies: Sets the multi-year growth strategy for the company

coreCompetencies: Owns the enterprise growth vision across products
Aligns growth strategy with business and revenue goals
Defines reference growth models and playbooks adopted company-wide
Leads growth strategy for new products and expansion
Establishes experimentation, metric and guardrail standards at scale
